title: The slirp4netns sandbox requires pivot_root
body:
Disable the sandbox, when running on rootfs

Closes #8846

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *afbjorklund*, *mheon*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Once slirp4netns grows a "--no-pivot" feature, that could be detected and used instead.
Currently it is just assumed that using "--enable-sandbox" requires pivot_root support...

Note that this shouldn't change anything for the default podman setup (not running off rootfs)
It is only required when wanting to use rootless/slirp4netns and also running from a RAM disk
